lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order and has been meticulously maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but no significant damage. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep shine and no visible scratches, chips, or dents. Inside, the cabin remains in immaculate shape, with leather that looks and smells new and all electronic features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and kept in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare opportunity to own a perfectly preserved example that drives exactly as it did the day it was manufactured.

Looking for a dependable daily driver that won't break the bank? This car is a solid choice! It’s been a reliable companion and is ready to get you where you need to go. While it shows some character through honest wear and tear and has a few minor cosmetic and mechanical needs, it remains a functional and practical option for anyone seeking value.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows signs of regular use over the years. While it remains a functional daily driver, there are several areas that will eventually need attention. The engine runs but has a minor oil leak and could benefit from a comprehensive service. The transmission is operational, though shifts can be somewhat sluggish at times. Visually, the exterior has seen better days, with visible paint oxidation on the roof and various scuffs and small dents around the body. Inside, the cabin is intact but the seats show significant wear and the air conditioning is not blowing as cold as it should. This car is best suited for someone looking for a reliable base to improve upon or a budget-conscious buyer who can manage these known issues.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Meticulously maintained and aesthetically flawless, it represents the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of excellence, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in quality and performance.

Hey everyone! 👋 I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it’s basically like driving it off the lot for the first time! It's been pampered, garage-kept, and looks totally flawless inside and out. You really have to see it to believe how perfect it is!
Presenting a concours-level E46 M3, meticulously maintained for the discerning purist. The S54 power plant remains in peak operating condition
Mint condition. One owner. Zero accidents. Garage stored. Clean title. Maintenance records available.

Presented in absolute showroom condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips, swirls, or scratches, complemented by pristine alloy wheels and factory-fresh trim. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still retains its original 'new car' fragrance. Every electronic component, from the advanced infotainment suite to the ambient lighting, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been exclusively garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy at authorized service centers. The engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a history of meticulous care. This is a turn-key example that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did on the dealership floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, confirms its status as a premier specimen of its class. Offered for acquisition at a price reflecting its uncompromising quality and heritage.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled caliber, this specimen remains in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no discernible signs of previous ownership, it represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising standard of excellence, this offering provides a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle that remains in its most pristine, investment-grade state.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute beauty. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! No scratches, no dings, just pure perfection. It’s been my pride and joy, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy this flawless ride. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Presenting an investment-grade example of an analog masterpiece. This vehicle features a high-revving, naturally aspirated 3.2L S54 inline
Mint condition. Garage kept. Clean title. All service records available. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, stone chips, or swirls, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in high-performance tires. Inside, the cabin remains in a flawless state; the premium leather upholstery shows no creases or signs of wear, and the original protective films are still present on several interior trim pieces. Mechanically, the car is perfect, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from certified master technicians. Every feature, from the advanced navigation interface to the panoramic sunroof and high-fidelity sound system, operates exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just left the dealership floor. Includes two sets of keys, all original manuals, and a clean title.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. With its mechanical integrity beyond reproach, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, reflecting a pedigree of uncompromising care. An ideal acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, this car is a total gem! It’s in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just drove off the lot for the first time. I’ve kept it tucked away in the garage and babied it since day one, so it’s completely flawless inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new and runs like a dream, you’ve found it! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offering a concourse-grade specimen featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant with individual throttle bodies and a meticulously maintained VAN
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Professional detail just completed.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, preserving its flawless original paint and high-gloss finish. The interior is immaculate, featuring pristine leather upholstery with no signs of wear, a smoke-free cabin, and all original appointments in perfect working order. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; the engine runs silently, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and every service milestone has been documented with an open-checkbook philosophy. With remarkably low mileage and zero cosmetic or mechanical imperfections, this is a rare opportunity to own a ‘time capsule’ example of this model. Perfect for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. With its flawless finish and impeccable mechanical integrity, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior appointment adheres to the highest benchmarks of quality. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents an uncompromising investment in excellence.

Oh my gosh, you guys, this car is absolutely stunning! It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this beauty from day one, so it’s in truly pristine condition inside and out. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This FD3S RX-7 is a superlative example of 90s JDM engineering, powered by the 13B-REW rotary engine featuring a fully synchronized sequential twin-turbocharger system that holds factory-spec boost pressure. The chassis retains its ideal 50/50 weight distribution, complemented by a precise 5-speed manual transmission and a factory Torsen limited-slip differential. Recent compression tests confirm optimal health across all rotor faces. Every component, from the intricate vacuum line network to the double-wishbone suspension, remains in showroom-grade condition. This is a mechanically transparent, unmodified specimen for the collector who demands peak analog performance and structural integrity.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Interior and exterior flawless. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with no chips, swirls, or imperfections, complemented by curb-free alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains in an 'as-new' state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of wear, while the dashboard and controls show zero signs of use. Every electronic feature, from the premium sound system to the advanced driver-assist technology, functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history exclusively through authorized dealerships. It has been garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. Included are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a spotless vehicle history report. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting meticulous ownership and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest standards of preservation. For the discerning enthusiast who demands excellence, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example.
